main.subtitle: A simple inventory ecosystem designed to showcase Clean Architecture, DDD, and Type-Safe development with Next.js 16.

motivation.title: Motivation & Study Goals
motivation.description: This project started as a deep dive into decoupled software design. The goal was to build a scalable React application where the business logic (Core) remains agnostic of the framework (Next.js) or database (Prisma/Postgres). It serves as a laboratory for implementing DDD principles, boundary separation, and Type-Safe development.

highlights.core: The heart. Agnostic to any database or UI framework. TypeScript at its purest form.
highlights.infra: Implementation details. Prisma, External Services, and Factories are mapped here.
highlights.lib: Cross-cutting concerns like Shadcn UI config, Zod schemas, and shared utilities.

cicd.title: CI/CD Pipeline
cicd.description: A robust automation workflow using GitHub Actions to ensure code stability and immutable deployments.

setup.title: Setup & Cache
setup.desc: Initializes environment and caches pnpm store for ultra-fast builds.

qa.title: Quality Assurance
qa.desc: Runs ESLint and Prettier check. Any code style violation breaks the build.

testing.title: Automated Testing
testing.desc: Executes Jest suite. High coverage ensures DDD business rules remain intact.

build.title: Production Build
build.desc: Validates Prisma schemas and Next.js compilation for a type-safe artifact.

deploy.title: Vercel Deployment
deploy.desc: Pre-built strategy: what passes in the CI is exactly what goes to production.

footer.about: I am a Software Engineer focused on high-performance web applications and scalable architectures. This project represents my commitment to clean code and continuous learning.
